routes.description: Clan management (manager-only; non-managers are redirected to the clan dashboard).
Live clan-positions map. Shows current location of every clan member running the plugin.
Voxlab — clan logo editor (manager-only; mounts the VoxlabEditor over the clan's current logo).
A clan's dashboard. :slug is the clan's lowercase slug.
Home — the landing page and clan directory.
Your account — clans, RSNs, linked accounts, sign-in devices, vault.
Device login — sign in by linking this device.
Account recovery — regain access to an account.
Your data-rights browser — export or delete your stored data.
Privacy Policy — placeholder shell pending legal text.
Terms of Service — placeholder shell pending legal text.
Site voxlab — main logo editor (site-owner only).
